name: docwright
description: Organizational operating system for policy-driven teams

scripts.test:mcp: mocha --require tsx/cjs test/mcp/steps.test.ts && mocha --require tsx/cjs test/mcp/config.test.ts && mocha --require tsx/cjs test/mcp/mutation.test.ts && mocha --require tsx/cjs test/mcp/transitions.test.ts && mocha --require tsx/cjs test/mcp/query_utility.test.ts && mocha --require tsx/cjs test/mcp/contribution.test.ts && mocha --require tsx/cjs test/mcp/intake.test.ts && mocha --require tsx/cjs test/mcp/verify_tests.test.ts && mocha --require tsx/cjs test/mcp/parity.test.ts && mocha --require tsx/cjs test/mcp/paths.test.ts
scripts.test:hooks: bash test/hooks/test-hook-source-unification.sh && bash test/hooks/test-identity-cache-scope.sh && bash test/hooks/test-claude-hook-resolution.sh && bash test/hooks/test-lifecycle-hook.sh && bash test/hooks/test-research-hook.sh && bash test/hooks/test-human-approved-hook.sh && bash test/hooks/test-approve-by-move.sh && bash test/hooks/test-end-session-autoland.sh && bash test/hooks/test-location-invariant-frontmatter.sh && bash test/hooks/test-end-session-isolate-debt.sh && bash test/hooks/test-pretooluse-plan-edit-block.sh
scripts.test: npm run test:atoms && npm run atoms:isolation && npm run test:dispatch && npm run test:executor && npm run test:mcp && npm run test:hooks:pending && npm run test:hooks && npm run test:compat && npm run test:integration && npm run test:scripts
scripts.test:webui: mocha --require tsx/cjs test/webui/auth.test.ts test/webui/opencode-auth-wiring.test.ts test/webui/opencode-events.test.ts test/webui/opencode-events-integration.test.ts test/webui/ai-sessions.test.ts test/webui/ai-stream.test.ts test/webui/agent-activity-model.test.ts test/webui/plan-review-live.test.ts test/webui/live-improve-extract.test.ts test/webui/ai-presence.test.ts test/webui/chat-utils.test.ts test/webui/diff-annotate.test.ts test/webui/plan-generator.test.ts test/webui/git-commit.test.ts test/webui/markdown-roundtrip.test.ts
